name: Lynwood Slipcover Cube Ottoman with Tie Details Cream - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Bring a sophisticated look to your living space with this Slipcover Cube Ottoman with Tie Details from Threshold™ designed w/Studio McGee. Constructed with a wooden frame, this ottoman is designed in a cream hue for calm vibes. Designed in a square shape, this ottoman has a polyester slipcover and polyurethane filling to provide you with comfy seating. Plus, the slipcover has tie attachments for a secure fit.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
